title: selago swaziensis
intro: Selago swaziensis, also known as Swazi's spike, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Swaziland and South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selago swaziensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Selago swaziensis can be made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever and skin irritations.
